description: Catalog of documented contradiction patterns for PawVital AI. Each entry defines a single detectable contradiction, its resolution strategy, and the future mapping to the uncertainty-contract conflicting_evidence reason (VET-1002 wiring is out of scope here).

cases.description: Owner's structured answer records appetite_status = 'normal' but free-text description contains 'not eating'
cases.trigger_condition: appetite_status === 'normal' AND owner text includes 'not eating'
cases.safe_next_step: Ask: 'You mentioned your dog seems normal but also said they're not eating — can you clarify what you meant?'
cases.notes: No exported function handles text-text contradictions yet. Wiring is planned for VET-1002 / VET-1005.

cases.description: lethargy_severity is recorded as 'mild' but owner free text says 'barely moving'
cases.trigger_condition: lethargy_severity === 'mild' AND owner text includes 'barely moving'
cases.safe_next_step: Ask: 'You rated lethargy as mild, but said your dog is barely moving — which is more accurate right now?'
cases.notes: No exported function handles text-text contradictions yet.

cases.description: limping_onset is 'gradual' but owner says 'happened suddenly today'
cases.trigger_condition: limping_onset === 'gradual' AND owner text includes 'happened suddenly today'
cases.safe_next_step: Ask: 'You mentioned it came on gradually, but also said it happened suddenly today — can you tell me more?'
cases.notes: No exported function handles text-text contradictions yet.

cases.description: water_intake recorded as 'not_drinking' but owner says 'drinking fine'
cases.trigger_condition: water_intake === 'not_drinking' AND owner text includes 'drinking fine'
cases.safe_next_step: Ask: 'Your answer says not drinking, but you also said drinking fine — which reflects your dog right now?'
cases.notes: No exported function handles text-text contradictions yet.

cases.description: gum_color recorded as 'pink_normal' but owner describes 'white gums' in free text
cases.trigger_condition: gum_color === 'pink_normal' AND owner text includes 'white gums'
cases.safe_next_step: Take worst-case (white gums) and proceed on urgent pathway.
cases.notes: Resolution is 'escalate' / take_worst_case because pale gums are a safety-critical finding.

cases.description: breathing_status recorded as 'normal' but difficulty_breathing symptom is also present
cases.safe_next_step: Treat as difficulty_breathing and proceed on urgent/emergency pathway.
cases.notes: Resolution is 'escalate' because respiratory distress is safety-critical.

cases.description: Owner reports puppy concern but age is recorded as > 1 year
cases.safe_next_step: Ask: 'You described this as a puppy concern, but your dog's age is over 1 year — can you confirm their age?'
cases.notes: No exported function handles text-text contradictions yet.

cases.description: Image is classified by preprocess as 'eye' domain, but the owner message and session symptoms contain no eye-related content
cases.trigger_condition: preprocess.domain === 'eye' AND NOT ownerText includes 'eye' AND NOT 'eye_discharge' in known_symptoms
cases.expected_contradiction_message: image suggests an eye-focused issue while owner text is about a different complaint
cases.safe_next_step: Ask: 'The image looks like it may relate to an eye issue — is there something going on with your dog's eyes?'

cases.description: Image is classified as 'ear' domain, but the owner message and session symptoms contain no ear-related content
cases.trigger_condition: preprocess.domain === 'ear' AND NOT ownerText includes 'ear' AND NOT 'ear_scratching' in known_symptoms
cases.expected_contradiction_message: image suggests an ear-focused issue while owner text is about a different complaint
cases.safe_next_step: Ask: 'The image looks like it may relate to an ear issue — is your dog having any trouble with their ears?'

cases.description: Image is classified as 'stool_vomit' domain, but the owner message does not mention vomiting, stool, diarrhea or related terms
cases.expected_contradiction_message: image suggests stool or vomit evidence that is not clearly described in the owner message
cases.safe_next_step: Ask: 'The image may show digestive material — is your dog experiencing vomiting or diarrhea?'

cases.description: session.extracted_answers.which_leg specifies a directional side (left/right) that does not match the body region detected in the image
cases.trigger_condition: which_leg is set AND bodyRegion is set AND /(left|right)/.test(which_leg) AND which_leg does not include bodyRegion.split(' ')[0]
cases.expected_contradiction_message: owner-reported location and image body region do not fully align
cases.safe_next_step: Ask: 'You mentioned the left leg, but the image looks like it may be the right — can you confirm which leg is affected?'

cases.description: VisionClinicalEvidence.severity is 'urgent' but the vision analysis text does not contain the word 'urgent' and no red flags have been triggered in the session
cases.trigger_condition: evidence.severity === 'urgent' AND NOT analysisText includes 'urgent' AND session.red_flags_triggered.length === 0
cases.expected_contradiction_message: visual severity is high without matching text red flags
cases.safe_next_step: Treat visual finding as the binding severity signal and proceed on urgent pathway.
